pageContext.name: Luke Skywalker and Grogu
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to present the Luke Skywalker and Grogu 1:10 Scale Statue from The Mandalorian Art Scale Series. This limited edition polystone Star Wars statue is based on original references and is hand-painted.   Don't miss your chance to add Luke Skywalker and Grogu to your Star Wars collection!
